name: Aloha Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chopped macadamia nuts - OR - walnuts
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1. In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add egg and mix well.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt; add to the butter mixture alternately with the pineapple, mixing after each addition.
4. Stir in chopped macadamia nuts and figs.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 10 to 12 minutes.
7. While cookies are still warm, dip them into a glaze made by mixing powdered sugar with milk, then coat with flaked coconut.
Source: California Dried Figs - Recipes...Serving Ideas
